# Project requirements
#
# This is a Node.js project. JavaScript dependencies are installed from:
# - client/package-lock.json
# - server/package-lock.json
#
# Install them with:
# - cd client && npm ci
# - cd server && npm ci

# Node.js >=18
# npm >=9

# Local configuration required for the server
# server/.env                            (generated by `npm run setup`)
# server/credentials/service-account.json

# Cached setup values (auto-managed, do not edit by hand)
# ~/.config/compliance-chatbot/setup.json

# External services required at runtime
# - Google Cloud Dialogflow CX agent access

# Optional integrations
# - Google Cloud Storage bucket for the regulatory corpus.
#   Set GCS_DOCUMENTS_BUCKET in server/.env. The @google-cloud/storage
#   client is bundled with the server. The service account in
#   GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS needs roles/storage.objectViewer on
#   the bucket.

# Convenience npm scripts (from server/)
# - npm run setup           interactive .env setup (defaults from cache)
# - npm run setup -- --from-cache   non-interactive restore from cache
# - npm run dev             start the API in nodemon
# - npm run start           start the API in production mode
# - npm run seed            seed demo escalations + document fixtures
# - npm run seed:force      overwrite existing fixtures
# - npm run smoke           smoke-test the dashboard API
# - npm run smoke:chat      also exercise the live Dialogflow chat path
